==Card Redemption==
Throughout [[Cathay]], cards can be collected and exchanged for various rewards. Cards vary from tier 1 (white) to tier 5 (orange) and there's different types of each tier. Below is a list of the rewards that can be exchanged, and how many times.

==Tier 1 (White)==
'''Recommended:'''  
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="8" style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" |[[File:Mahjong white.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="8" |Mahjong
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail ATK +8<br>Snail RUSH +8
| rowspan="8" |{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}} +9
|-
|2x1||{{RewardIconWithText|Cathay INTEL}} +1,000
|-
|3x1||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}} +3k
|-
|4x1||{{RewardIconWithLink|Novice Scroll|blue}} +5
|-
|5x1||{{RewardIconWithGearlink|white|Realm|Podao}} 
|-
|6x1||{{RewardIconWithGearlink|white|Realm|Iron Helmet}}
|-
|7x1||Unlock [[Cathay Generals|Cathay General]] (Kiddon Kong Rong)
|-
|8x1
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket|orange}} +1
|-
| style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" |[[File:Straw Ship.png|75x75px]]
|Straw Ship
|2x1
|{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup}} +1h30m
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +2m
|-
| style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" |[[File:Go.png|75x75px]]
|Go
|2x1
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}} +6k
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}} +180
|-
| style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" |[[File:Zither.png|75x75px]]
|Zither
|3x1
|{{RewardIconWithText|Cathay INTEL}} +1,500
|{{RewardIconWithText|Cathay INTEL}} +300
|}

==Tier 2 (Green)==
'''Recommended:''' 
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="8" style="background-color:#7de87f;" |[[File:Mahjong green.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="8" |Mahjong
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail DEF +8<br>Snail RUSH +8
| rowspan="8" |27 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Cathay INTEL +2,000
|-
|3x1||6k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll +5
|-
|5x1||[[Gear|<span style="color:#40da25;">Heart-Protection Mirror</span>]]
|-
|6x1||Gear Chest +40
|-
|7x1||Unlock [[Cathay Generals|Cathay General]]Rebel Zhang Jiao
|-
|8x1
|Lottery Ticket +2
|-
| style="background-color:#7de87f;" |[[File:Empty Fort Strat.png|75x75px]]
|Empty Fort Strat
|3x2
|[[Bronze Bird|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Bronze Bird</span>]] +10
|340 B-tads
|-
| style="background-color:#7de87f;" |[[File:Peach Garden.png|75x75px]]
|Peach Garden
|3x1
|Glue +50
|Evolution Chest +1
|-
| style="background-color:#7de87f;" |[[File:Kungfu.png|75x75px]]
|Kungfu
|4x1
|Lottery Ticket +2
|Offering Speedup +3m
|}

==Tier 3 (Blue)==
'''Recommended:''' 
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="9" style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{RewardIcon|Mahjong blue|75}}
| rowspan="9" |Mahjong
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail HP +100<br>Snail ATK +10
| rowspan="9" |{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +81}}
|-
|2x1||{{RewardIconWithText|Cathay INTEL, +3k}}
|-
|3x1||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
|-
|4x1||{{RewardIconWithLink|Novice Scroll, +10|blue}}
|-
|5x1||{{RewardIconWithGearlink|blue|Realm|Rainbow Tassel}}
|-
|6x1||{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest, +60}}
|-
|7x1||Unlock [[Cathay Generals|Cathay General]] Charming Chan
|-
|8x1||{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +3|orange}}
|-
|8x1
|{{RewardIconWithText|Immortal Engine}} (Use to repair [[Rocket]] {{RewardIconWithText|Thruster}})
|-
| style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{RewardIcon|Wu Hou Shrine|75}}
|Wu Hou Shrine
|3x1
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +600}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +10}}
|-
| style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{RewardIcon|Baidi Fortress|75}}
|Baidi Fortress
|5x2
|{{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, +2k}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, +50}}
|}

==Tier 4 (Purple)==
'''Recommended:''' 
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="8" style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" |[[File:Mahjong purple.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="8" |Mahjong
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail DEF +12<br>Snail RUSH +12
| rowspan="8" |243 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Cathay INTEL +4,000
|-
|3x1||14k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Expert Scroll +10
|-
|5x1||[[Gear|<span style="color:#ee96d5;">Silver Lion</span>]]
|-
|6x1||Gear Chest +80
|-
|7x1
|Unlock [[Cathay Generals|Cathay General]] Healer Hua Tuo
|-
|8x2
|Lottery Ticket +2
|-
| rowspan="2" style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" |[[File:Great Wall.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="2" |Great Wall
|2x1||Machine Manuals (Unlock [[Home Base|Arsenal]])
| rowspan="2" |Cathay Treasure Map +2
|-
|2x1||Cathay Treasure Map +50
|-
| style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" |[[File:Yellow River.png|75x75px]]
|Yellow River
|3x2
|Offering Speedup +4h
|Offering Speedup +5m
|}

==Tier 5 (Orange)==
'''Recommended:''' 
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:#ffb066;" |[[File:Mahjong orange.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="7" |Mahjong
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail HP +140<br>Snail ATK +14
| rowspan="7" |729 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Cathay INTEL +5,000
|-
|3x1||Gear Chest +100
|-
|4x1||20k B-tads
|-
|5x1||Master Scroll +1
|-
|6x1||Unlock [[Cathay Generals|Cathay General]] Chief Meng Huo
|-
|7x2
|Lottery Ticket +2
|-
| style="background-color:#ffb066;" |[[File:Emperor.png|75x75px]]
|Emperor
|3x1
|Wish Coin +1
|15 W-tads
|}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Cathay]]
